use_cases: Display loading state during page transitions or navigation
Indicate async operation in progress like API calls or data fetching
Keep users engaged while form submissions process
Show loading during content or media loading
Replace generic spinners with a more engaging visual experience
ai_summary: A whimsical rocket-themed loading animation featuring a rocket with animated flames, floating clouds, and fading decorative elements. The component uses pure CSS shapes and animations to create an engaging feedback indicator that replaces standard loading spinners. Ideal for adding personality to loading states in web applications while maintaining user attention during async operations.
